subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Give this one, athirst for the pure waters of life, to drink from the fountain of immortality, and heal this ailing one through Thy celestial remedy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين تشنهء سلسبيل حيات را از چشمهء حيوان بنوشان و اين عليل را از درمان ملکوتی
subcodes.subjects: @religion as source of love and unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for healing, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
